mapper.select:
SELECT p.item_id AS itemId, p.title, p.sales_type, p.service_type,
p.local1, p.local2, p.local3, p.jibun_address AS jibunAddress,
p.deposit, p.rent, p.manage_cost AS manageCost, p.manage_not_includes AS manageNotIncludes,
p.options, p.area_m2 AS areaM2, p.area_contract_m2 AS areaContractM2, p.floor_level AS floorLevel, p.all_floors AS allFloors,
p.lat, p.lng,
p.subway, p.nb_distribution AS nbDistribution, p.nb_amenity AS nbAmenity, p.nb_poi, p.item_image FROM property p inner join like_home as lh on p.item_id = lh.item_id WHERE lh.user_id = #{userId}

WITH top AS ( SELECT lh.item_id, COUNT(*) AS likeCount7d FROM like_home lh JOIN property p ON p.item_id = lh.item_id WHERE lh.created_at >= (now() - interval '7 days') AND p.sold = FALSE GROUP BY lh.item_id ORDER BY likeCount7d DESC, lh.item_id DESC LIMIT 5 ) SELECT p.item_id AS itemId, p.title, p.sales_type, p.service_type, p.local1, p.local2, p.local3, p.jibun_address AS jibunAddress, p.deposit, p.rent, p.manage_cost AS manageCost, p.manage_not_includes AS manageNotIncludes, p.options, p.area_m2 AS areaM2, p.area_contract_m2 AS areaContractM2, p.floor_level AS floorLevel, p.all_floors AS allFloors, p.lat, p.lng, p.subway, p.nb_distribution AS nbDistribution, p.nb_amenity AS nbAmenity, p.nb_poi, p.item_image, top.likeCount7d,
CASE WHEN #{userId} = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE (lh_u.user_id IS NOT NULL) END AS userLike
FROM top JOIN property p ON p.item_id = top.item_id LEFT JOIN like_home lh_u ON lh_u.item_id = p.item_id AND lh_u.user_id = #{userId}
ORDER BY top.likeCount7d DESC, p.item_id DESC
